response:
Emily started with 25 dogs at her center located at [address], and she gained 4 puppies on Thursday plus 1 stray on Friday, bringing the total to 30 before the weekend adoptions occurred. The [date] of the adoptions was Saturday, when 2 families took 3 dogs each, meaning 6 dogs left the [location] and the current count is now 24 dogs.

To manage the new intake, Emily needs to update the [record] system and ensure the [contact] information for the new adopters is correct. She also plans to visit the [town] where the puppies came from and will need a [vehicle] to transport supplies to the [shelter].
